heading: Relationship to State laws
label: 5410 Relationship to State laws
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed to preempt any rights or causes of action that any buyer may have with respect to any seller of fasteners under the law of any State, except to the extent that the provisions of this chapter are in conflict with such State law.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 5 and is classified to .section 8 of Pub. L. 101–592section 5407 of this title
